zh.Mabe, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾馬貝
zh.Fentongollan,Tregothnan Cornwall, Englan: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾特雷格南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Trenoweth於大約1365年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親John Trenoweth29歲，母親Joan Treiago21歲。他於大約1400年與Jane Basset結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1427年8月15日在他的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.Mabe, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾馬貝
zh-hans.Fentongollan,Tregothnan Cornwall, Englan: 英国英格兰可瓦爾特雷格南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Trenoweth于大约1365年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲John Trenoweth29岁，母亲Joan Treiago21岁。他于大约1400年与Jane Basset结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1427年8月15日在他的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trenoweth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from one or more of at least twenty places in Cornwall named with Cornish tre ‘house, settlement’ + nowyth ‘new’, with the spellings Trenewth, Trenouth, Trenowah, Trenower, Trenoweth, Trenowth, Trenute, or Trenuth.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Trenoweth was born about 1365, in Cornwall, England, his father, John Trenoweth, was 29 and his mother, Joan Treiago, was 21. He married Jane Basset about 1400. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 August 1427, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Trenoweth est né environ 1365, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Trenoweth, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Treiago, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jane Basset environ 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 août 1427, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Trenoweth um 1365 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Trenoweth 29 und seine Mutter Joan Treiago 21. Er hat um 1400 Jane Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. August 1427 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Trenoweth è nato il circa 1365 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, John Trenoweth, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan Treiago, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jane Basset circa 1400. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 agosto 1427, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenowethが約1365年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父John Trenowethは29歳，母Joan Treiagoは21歳であった。約1400年にJane Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1427年8月15日に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Trenoweth(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Treiago(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 Jane Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1427년 8월 15일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Trenoweth nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Trenoweth, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Treiago, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Basset aproximadamente 1400. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1427, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Trenoweth родился около 1365 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John Trenoweth было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Treiago, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Basset около 1400 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 августа 1427 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Trenoweth nació aproximadamente 1365, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Trenoweth, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Treiago, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jane Basset aproximadamente 1400. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1427, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
